title: sphaeroma gayanum
side_effects: Sphaeroma gayanum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can also cause skin irritation, rashes, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to respiratory problems, such as difficulty breathing and coughing. Furthermore, improper use of sphaeroma gayanum can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions.
